sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Owner of Detroit Free Press, USA TODAY Co., to acquire The Detroit News
feed.summary: USA TODAY Co., owner of the Detroit Free Press, announced its intention to acquire The Detroit News from MediaNews Group through a binding letter of intent. This acquisition aims to strengthen the USA TODAY Network's audience and reinforce its commitment to local journalism, with both the Detroit Free Press and The Detroit News continuing to publish separately. This development follows the recent dissolution of a long-standing joint operating agreement between the two Detroit newspapers.

feed.title: What is Zacks Research's Forecast for PepsiCo Q1 Earnings?
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its Q1 2026 EPS estimate for PepsiCo to $1.49, while the company recently reported strong quarterly results of $2.26 EPS and $29.34 billion in revenue, exceeding analyst expectations. PepsiCo also announced a $10.0 billion stock buyback program and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.4225, signaling continued shareholder returns. Despite some negative sentiment regarding potential price cuts on snacks, the company is focusing on health-forward innovations and strategic marketing to drive growth.

feed.title: (SO) Southern Company Expects 2026 Adjusted EPS Range $4.50 - $4.60, vs. FactSet Est of $4.55
authors: (SO) Southern Company Expects 2026 Adjusted EPS Range $4.50 - $4.60
feed.summary: Southern Company (SO) announced its adjusted EPS guidance for 2026, forecasting a range of $4.50 to $4.60 which is in line with FactSet's estimate of $4.55. This announcement came shortly after the company reported its Q4 adjusted net income and total operating revenue rise, as well as Q4 revenue of $6.98 billion and adjusted EPS of $0.55 per share.

feed.title: A Look At Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) has shown strong share price momentum, with gains of about 9% in the last month and 21% in the past three months. While one valuation model suggests it is 1.5% overvalued compared to a fair value estimate of $19.96, another discounted cash flow (DCF) model indicates it is 33% undervalued at $20.26 against an estimated future cash flow value of $30.07. Investors are encouraged to review the full analysis, considering potential risks like climate disruptions or business travel weakness.

feed.title: Pentagon Says RTX Improves ‘Poor’ Performance on Crucial Missile
feed.summary: The Pentagon reports that RTX Corp. has enhanced its ability to deliver a crucial missile for the U.S. Navy. This statement indicates an improvement in what was previously described as "poor" performance regarding the production of key munitions. The article suggests this is a significant development for the U.S. military and its defense capabilities.

feed.title: Evergy Expects 2026 Earnings To Rise
feed.summary: Evergy Inc. (EVRG) has released its guidance for fiscal year 2026, projecting adjusted earnings of $4.14 to $4.34 per share, an increase from $3.83 per share in fiscal 2025. The company also set a long-term adjusted EPS growth target of 6% to 8%+ annually through 2030, based on the 2026 guidance midpoint. Evergy anticipates its adjusted EPS growth will exceed 8% from 2028 through 2030, boosted by new and expanding customer projects.

feed.title: How to See if You Qualify for an Amex Platinum Card Without Impacting Your Credit Score
feed.summary: The American Express Platinum Card offers a generous welcome bonus and thousands of dollars in perks, but not everyone will qualify for it. Potential applicants can check their eligibility without impacting their credit score, although accepting the card will affect it. The card is designed for individuals with "good" to "excellent" credit, and American Express has a "once-in-a-lifetime" rule for welcome bonuses.

feed.title: BrainsWay Announces New Minority-Stake Investment in Canadian Provider, BrainStim Health Inc.
feed.summary: BrainsWay, a leader in neurostimulation treatments, has invested $1.0 million, with a potential for an additional $1.5 million, in BrainStim Health Inc., a Canadian mental health provider. This minority-stake investment aims to expand access and awareness of Deep TMS technology in North America. BrainsWay views this as part of a broader strategy to support growth-oriented clinical service platforms while focusing on scientific and clinical advancement.

feed.title: Pool Corporation Reports Year End and Fourth Quarter 2025 Results; Provides 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (POOL) announced its full year and fourth quarter 2025 results, reporting annual net sales of $5.3 billion, consistent with the previous year, and a diluted EPS of $10.85. The company highlighted stability in maintenance sales and growth in building materials in the latter half of 2025, with expectations for modest sales growth and improved earnings in 2026, forecasting diluted EPS between $10.85 and $11.15. POOLCORP attributes its performance to its customer experience, diverse product portfolio, and strategic investments despite an evolving market.

feed.title: CISO Global Lands 30 Year Sales Veteran Michael Czerneda to Ignite the Next Wave of Software Growth
feed.summary: CISO Global, a provider of AI-powered cybersecurity software and compliance services, has appointed Michael Czerneda as Vice President of Sales. Czerneda, a 30-year sales veteran, will accelerate the company's transition to software-driven growth, focusing on expanding its cyber services customer base and leveraging insurance distribution channels. This strategic hire aims to build a world-class sales organization and drive adoption of CISO Global's cybersecurity software products.

feed.title: Freeport signs agreement with Indonesia to extend Grasberg mining rights through 2041 (FCX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) has signed a memorandum of understanding with the Indonesian government to extend its Grasberg mining permit. This agreement ensures long-term access to one of the world's largest copper and gold mines through 2041. The deal secures the future operations of the significant Grasberg resource for Freeport.

feed.title: HASI prices $600 million green junior subordinated notes offering
feed.summary: HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. (HASI) has priced a $600 million offering of 7.125% green junior subordinated notes due 2056. The company intends to use the net proceeds, estimated at $592.2 million, to repay existing credit facilities or senior notes, and to allocate an equivalent amount to eligible green projects. HASI, which has a market capitalization of approximately $4.9 billion, has a history of consistent dividend payments and projects growth in sales and net income this year.

feed.title: 3D Protein Structure Analysis Market Report 2026 Featuring Profiles of Merck, Bruker Corp., Thermo Fisher Scientific, JEOL, Spectris and Other Leading Players
feed.summary: The global 3D protein structure analysis market is projected to grow from $3.4 billion in 2025 to $5.3 billion by 2030, driven by its crucial role in drug development, personalized medicine, and biotech research. Key technologies like X-ray crystallography, NMR, and cryo-EM are central to this growth, with North America currently dominating and Asia-Pacific showing rapid expansion. The market faces challenges such as high equipment costs and a shortage of skilled personnel, but technological advancements and strategic investments are propelling its forward trajectory.

feed.title: Deckers Outdoor Stock: A Clash of Institutional and Insider Sentiment
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corporation is experiencing conflicting signals in the market, with institutional investors increasing their stakes while company insiders are selling shares. The company's key brands, HOKA and UGG, showed strong revenue growth, with strategic marketing efforts aiming to maintain momentum. Analysts have an average price target of $125.20 and a "Hold" rating, with the company's gross margin and full-year revenue guidance being crucial for its stock trajectory.

feed.title: Quanta Services Posts Record 2025 Results, Backlog Surges
feed.summary: Quanta Services (PWR) reported record financial results for 2025, with revenue surging to $28.48 billion and net income exceeding $1.03 billion, while its backlog reached $43.98 billion. The company's strategic acquisitions, including Tri-City, Wilson Construction, and Billings Flying Service, are expected to further bolster its electric infrastructure and aviation capabilities, driving anticipated record backlog and double-digit earnings growth in 2026. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for PWR stock with a target price of $540.00, supported by strong financial performance and positive technical indicators despite concerns about its high P/E ratio.

Furthermore, CenterPoint expanded its 10-year capital investment plan by $500 million to a total of $65.5 billion, primarily for electric transmission projects.

feed.title: $19.8 Billion Cell and Gene Therapy Tools & Reagents Market Outlook, 2030 Featuring Thermo Fisher Scientific, Cytiva (Danaher), Merck, Miltenyi Biotec, Sartorius and More
feed.summary: The global market for cell and gene therapy tools and reagents is projected to reach $19.8 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 10.6% from $12 billion in 2025. This growth is driven by increasing clinical and commercial activities in cell and gene therapies (CGTs), significant R&D investments, and regulatory approvals for novel CGTs. The market report provides comprehensive insights into segmentation by product type, application, and end-user, profiling key players such as Thermo Fisher Scientific, Cytiva (Danaher), Merck, Miltenyi Biotec, and Sartorius.
